title: Smoky Juicy Plantain Skewers
description: A smoky and juicy midnight-craving Jamaican dish featuring plantains marinated in a blend of cider vinegar, tandoor spices, and infused with the warmth of a wood fire.
instructions: Slice plantains into half-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine plantain slices with cider vinegar, lime juice, smoked paprika, tandoori spice blend, minced garlic, honey, and salt. Mix well to coat the plantains evenly.
Thread plantain slices onto skewers (alternating between green and black ones for visual appeal).
Preheat a charcoal or gas grill to medium-high heat. Place skewers on the grill and cook until charred on all sides and slightly crispy, about 5-7 minutes per side.
For an extra smoky flavor, you can close the lid of the grill if using a gas grill during cooking for a few minutes.
Remove from heat and serve immediately with additional tandoori spice blend for dipping.
